title: Introduction to Armor and Weapons
description: Learn to craft and use armor and weapons

content.text:
Armor and Weapons

Armor protects you from damage, and weapons help you fight mobs and other players.

Armor Types:

  • Leather - Basic protection
  • Iron - Good protection
  • Gold - Fast enchanting
  • Diamond - Best protection
  • Netherite - Ultimate protection

Armor Pieces:

  • Helmet - Head protection
  • Chestplate - Body protection
  • Leggings - Leg protection
  • Boots - Foot protection

Weapons:

  • Sword - Melee combat
  • Bow - Ranged combat
  • Crossbow - Ranged combat
  • Trident - Ranged and melee

Crafting Tips:

  • Diamond is the best material for tools
  • Iron is a good balance of durability and availability
  • Always carry a sword for protection
content.task: Craft a full set of iron armor and an iron sword.
